skills.name: template-registry
skills.summary: Registers reusable project, module, file, test, configuration, deployment, and documentation templates.

skills.name: template-signing-and-provenance
skills.summary: Signs templates and records source, publisher, review, dependencies, license, and content lineage.

skills.name: semantic-code-model
skills.summary: Defines the language-neutral semantic model for projects, modules, types, members, dependencies, behavior, tests, and annotations.

skills.name: scaffold-composer
skills.summary: Composes repositories, applications, modules, directories, baseline files, tests, docs, and deployment roots.

skills.name: ast-cst-code-emitter
skills.summary: Emits compilable target-language source through AST/CST-aware writers and language adapters.

skills.name: configuration-file-emitter
skills.summary: Generates build, runtime, dependency, formatter, linter, container, CI, and environment configuration files.

skills.name: generated-file-ownership
skills.summary: Assigns managed, protected, user-owned, imported, and derived ownership modes to files and symbols.

skills.name: protected-region-and-extension-point
skills.summary: Defines protected source regions, partial types, interfaces, hooks, plugins, callbacks, and generated extension contracts.

skills.name: idempotent-generation-engine
skills.summary: Executes deterministic generation plans without duplicating semantic artifacts or creating unstable diffs.

skills.name: incremental-merge-engine
skills.summary: Performs AST/CST-aware, ownership-aware, and history-aware merges between generated intent and repository state.

skills.name: formatter-linter-normalizer
skills.summary: Formats, lints, type-checks, normalizes, and statically validates generated artifacts using pinned toolchains.

skills.name: generation-manifest-and-sbom
skills.summary: Publishes the generation manifest, artifact inventory, provenance, ownership, dependencies, tools, and software bill of materials.
